pages.title: About Us
pages.content:
About Pathway Academy Zone

We are a specialist Alternative Provision in Stoke-on-Trent supporting young people aged 11–16 who benefit from an alternative to mainstream education.

pages.title: Our Programmes
pages.content:
Our Programmes

Tailored pathways for Key Stage 3 and Key Stage 4 learners.

pages.title: Make a Referral
pages.content:
Make a Referral

Referrals are welcome from mainstream schools, Local Authorities, and family workers.

pages.title: Safeguarding & Pastoral
pages.content:
Keeping Young People Safe

Safeguarding is everyone's responsibility. We maintain the highest standards to ensure all young people feel safe, supported, and heard.

pages.title: Policies
pages.content: All Policies

pages.title: Knowledge Hub
pages.content: Knowledge Hub

pages.title: Contact Us
pages.content:
Get in Touch

Call 01782 365365 or email info@pathwayacademyzone.co.uk.
